_comment: Index template for the stingarc2-* evidence ledger (DESIGN.md §4.2). geo_point and ip types will NOT dynamic-map — required before first write. The engine installs this automatically on startup (EsWriter.ensure_bootstrap); this file is the manual-path copy. Source of truth: src/c2engine/ingest/es_assets.py. PUT _index_template/stingarc2

_meta.description: C2 evidence ledger: one immutable row per (session, c2_host, evidence). Drill-down surface; aggregate to c2-entities for per-C2 summaries.

fields.c2_host: C2 host/IP the attacker referenced or fetched from (THE pivot; same field name on every index)
fields.evidence: how this C2 was observed: shell_reference | served_file | file_callback
fields.evidence_rank: 0=referenced only, 1=served us a file, 2=host found inside served malware (chain)
fields.family: rules-based malware family, category.family/variant e.g. trojan.mirai/mozi
fields.content: full script source (served_file scripts only; binaries omit it)
fields.callbacks: onward hosts found inside this file (script text / binary strings)
fields.c2_via_sha256: file_callback rows: which served file (sha256) revealed this host
